title: TOPSOCCER - 211info
text: JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES TOPSOCCER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a peer supportive, safe, and inclusive soccer environment that focuses on player development, skill building, and fun rather than competition. Held at various locations in Albany and Corvallis. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 8-18 with intellectual, emotional, or physical disabilities Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-8844 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 223-8844 Salvador Maciel [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for form. Call or email for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Services: Disability Related Sports * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS HOUSING/SHELTER - NEXT STEPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT 541 MUTUAL SUPPORT - QUEER PEERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES
